zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Chamberlain於大約1368年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾卡斯托時，她的父親Sir Richard Chamberlain II59歲，母親Catherine Coates19歲。她於1380年與Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1410年在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Chamberlain于大约1368年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾卡斯托时，她的父亲Sir Richard Chamberlain II59岁，母亲Catherine Coates19岁。她于1380年与Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook在英国諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1410年在英国諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Chamberlain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name from Old French chambrelain, Norman French cambrelanc, cambrelen(c) ‘chamberlain’ (of ancient Germanic origin, from kamer ‘chamber, room’, Latin camera (see Chambers ) + the diminutive suffix -(l)ing). This was originally the name of an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, but is so widespread in late medieval England that it must sometimes have been used of people of more ordinary status, perhaps as a nickname for an officious or self-important person or for someone who played the role of chamberlain in a folk play, tableau, or ceremony. Compare Chancellor for a possible similar usage.

variants.name: Chamberlin
meanings: French: occupational name for an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, from Old French chamberlenc ‘chamberlain’. See also Chamberlain and compare above.

variants.name: Chambers
meanings: from Middle English chaumbre ‘room (in a house); reception room in a palace or official building’ (Old French chambre). It is identical in implied function with the Chamberlain , which denoted an official: to pay in cameram was to pay into the exchequer, of which the camerarius or chamberer was in charge. The surname also applied to clerks employed there. As the office of Chamberlain rose in the social scale, this term remained reserved for more humble servants of the bedchamber or private quarters.
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Les Chambres, Manche (France).

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Chamberlain was born about 1368, in Castor, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Chamberlain II, was 59 and her mother, Catherine Coates, was 19. She married Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook in 1380, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1410, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Chamberlain est née environ 1368, à Castor, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Chamberlain II, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Catherine Coates, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook en 1380, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1410, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Chamberlain um 1368 in Castor, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Chamberlain II 59 und ihre Mutter Catherine Coates 19. Sie hat 1380 in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1410 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Chamberlain è nata il circa 1368 nel Castor, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Chamberlain II, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Catherine Coates, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook nel 1380, nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1410, nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Chamberlainが約1368年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアカストルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Chamberlain IIは59歳，母Catherine Coatesは19歳であった。1380年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークでSir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrookと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1410年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Chamberlain(이)가 대략 1368년 영국 노르섬프토실르 카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Chamberlain II(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Coates(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1380년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Chamberlain nasceu aproximadamente 1368, em Castor, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Chamberlain II, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Coates, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook em 1380, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1410, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Chamberlain родилась около 1368 г. в местности кастор, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Chamberlain II было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Coates, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook в 1380 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1410 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Chamberlain nació aproximadamente 1368, en Castor, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Chamberlain II, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Catherine Coates, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Griffin Baron of Latimer, of Braybrook en 1380, en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1410, en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
